relations.note: Both rules govern the overall visual construction of the icon callout box.
The drop shadow is applied specifically to the badge element of the layout.

quotes: Light Blue `#E6F0F9` fill
Brand Blue `#00529b`, Nunito Sans weight 800
White `#ffffff` rounded square
white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge
The blue box itself is inset from the left by half the badge width so the badge's outer half has room
left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap
vertically centered to the box. Never let copy slide under the badge.
horizontally centered on the box's left edge
Let W = badge width (use 80px
Inset the blue box from the left by W/2 = 40px
Vertical center via top:50% + margin-top:-40px

rules.intent: Maintain visual alignment and structural relationships of the 50/50 badge overhang callout container.
rules.rule_text: The Icon Callout Box comprises a Light Blue (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) fill box inset by half the badge width W/2 (40px) on the left. Text is vertically centered, styled with Nunito Sans weight 800 in Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b), and must not slide under the badge. The white badge containing the line icon must be vertically centered on the box and horizontally centered on the box's left edge (50% overhang).
rules.snippets: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: <div style="position:relative; padding-left:40px;">
box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order
white badge mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order
white badge mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
Never simplify either to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

rules.intent: Maintain brand-specific asymmetric corner radius mirroring rules.
rules.rule_text: The outer callout box must use an asymmetric border-radius (radius.callout.icon_box_container = 40px 8px 40px 8px) resulting in a 5:1 ratio of large top-left/bottom-right corners to near-point top-right/bottom-left corners. The white icon badge must mirror this exact 5:1 accent shape at smaller scale (radius.callout.icon_badge_container = 20px 4px 20px 4px). Never simplify to uniform radii, swap corners, or flip diagonals.

quotes: box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18);
white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow so it lifts off the blue box
This shadow is required on every instance

rules.intent: Avoid a flat, pasted-on appearance of the icon badge.
rules.rule_text: The white icon badge must carry a drop shadow (shadow.callout.badge = 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18)) using Dark Navy at low opacity to elevate the badge off the blue container.
